title: 'Ayalown #0357
definition:
Ajalon or Aijalon = "field of deer"

 1) Levitical city in Dan, 14 miles or 25 km NW of Jerusalem, later
    ruled by the Amorites, then the Benjamites of Judah, then by the
    Philistines
 2) a city of Zebulun, site unknown
